entries.definition:
j–d–d ancestor, grandparent; luck, good fortune; greatness, glory, majesty; hard work, seriousness; new, to renew; middle of the road, main road, straight, correct path, level land. Of this root, three words occur 10 times in the Qurʾan: جَدّ jadd once; جَدِيد jadīd eight times and جُدَد judad once.
157
